Initializes the activity and showcases event posters to the administrator.

Initializes the activity and showcases event organizers to the administrator.

Initializes the activity and showcases the notifications that have been sent to app users.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EntrantDashboardActivity
Initializes the dashboard Activity, sets up the user interface, and binds click listeners to the navigation buttons to launch other activities via Intents.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.EventHistory
Initializes the Activity, sets up the user interface elements (ListView and Back Button), and triggers the loading of the user's event history from the database.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.ProfileActivity
Initializes the Activity, sets up the UI elements, fetches the Android device ID, and binds click listeners to the Save and Delete buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.entrant.SignUpActivity
Initializes the Activity, sets up the user interface elements, fetches the unique Android device ID, and binds a click listener to the Create Account button.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventDetailsActivity
Initializes the Activity, fetches the Entrant's device ID, parses the event ID passed via Intent, and queries Firestore to populate the UI.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.event.EventListActivity
Initializes the Activity, fetches the collection of events from Firestore, maps them to the local lists, and binds the data to the ListView via an ArrayAdapter.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.MainActivity
Initializes the Activity, binds UI elements, and sets up click listeners for the main navigation buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.CancelledFragment
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EnrolledFragment
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EntrantListActivity
Initializes the activity, connects the ListView and button to the layout, retrieves the event ID, and loads the entrants on the waiting list.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.EventQrCodeActivity
Initializes the activity, connects the views to the layout, retrieves the event ID, loads the event data, generates the QR code, and sets up the back and export buttons.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.InvitedFragment
 
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerCreateEventActivity
Initializes the activity, connects the input fields and buttons to the layout, sets up the date and time pickers, and prepares the create event form.
onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEditEventActivity
Initializes the activity, connects the input fields and buttons to the layout, sets up the date and time pickers, retrieves the event ID, and loads the event information for editing.

onCreate(Bundle) - Method in class com.example.getoutthere.organizer.OrganizerEventListActivity
